# sops_file (Data Source)

Decrypts a SOPS-encrypted file from disk.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `source_file` (String) Path to the SOPS-encrypted file.

### Optional

- `age` (Block, Optional) Per-resource age key override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--age))
- `aws` (Block, Optional) Per-resource AWS KMS credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aws))
- `azure` (Block, Optional) Per-resource Azure Key Vault credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--azure))
- `gcp` (Block, Optional) Per-resource GCP KMS credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcp))
- `input_type` (String) yaml, json, dotenv, ini, binary, or raw. Auto-detected from extension when omitted.
- `pgp` (Block, Optional) Per-resource PGP / GnuPG override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pgp))

### Read-Only

- `data` (Map of String, Sensitive) Flat map (carlpett-compatible).
- `data_json` (String, Sensitive) Structured nested JSON of the decrypted tree.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `raw` (String, Sensitive) Decrypted bytes as a string.

<a id="nestedblock--age"></a>
### Nested Schema for `age`

Optional:

- `key` (String, Sensitive)
- `key_command` (String)
- `key_file` (String)
- `ssh_private_key_file` (String)

Optional:

- `shared_credentials_files` (List of String)
